caribbean.headline: Martinique Sees 100% Rain, 15 kt Winds, 3 ft Seas
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique (port of Fort-de-France) is experiencing easterly winds to 15 kt, seas near 3.0 ft with a dominant SE swell at 5 s, and 100% rain probability at the port. I advise mariners in Martinique and nearby Curacao (winds to 17 kt) to expect reduced visibility, choppy short-period seas and brief localized runoff nearshore, and to monitor local forecasts for updates.

mediterranean.headline: Mykonos Seas Roughen with 22 kt Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeast winds up to 22 kt with wave heights near 5.1 ft and a 6 s NE swell, and rain less than 10% rain probability. I advise operators and small craft skippers to expect choppy conditions and exercise caution while Dubrovnik remains light with winds around 9 kt.
